query:
_index=sumologic_*_events AND _sourceCategory=cseInsight AND "{{ID}}"
| json "insight.readableId" nodrop
| where %"insight.readableId" = "{{ID}}"
| limit 1

| json "insight.timeToDetection" as timeToDetection nodrop

| if(IsEmpty(timeToDetection), 0, timeToDetection) as timeToDetection

| floor(timeToDetection/60/60/24) as timeToDetection_days
| timeToDetection - (timeToDetection_days*24*60*60) as timeToDetection

| floor(timeToDetection/60/60) as timeToDetection_hours
| timeToDetection - (timeToDetection_hours*60*60) as timeToDetection

| floor(timeToDetection/60) as timeToDetection_minutes
| timeToDetection - (timeToDetection_minutes*60) as timeToDetection

| floor(timeToDetection) as timeToDetection_seconds

| format("%s Days, %s Hrs, %s Min, %s Sec", ToInt(timeToDetection_days), ToInt(timeToDetection_hours), ToInt(timeToDetection_minutes), ToInt(timeToDetection_seconds)) as timeToDetection

| count as Total timeToDetection
| timeToDetection as Total

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides all comments (and other status changes) for an Insight provided in the filter.
